description: One speaker corrects another's initial time suggestion; the final agreed time (1 PM Monday) must be used, not the initial proposal (11 AM Monday).

events.title: Code Review
events.reasoning: Alice initially proposes Monday at 11 AM. Bob cannot do 11 AM and requests 1 PM Monday instead. All three confirm 1 PM to 2:30 PM (1.5 hours) on Monday in the dev room on the second floor.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: code review on Monday at 1 PM after initial 11 AM proposal was corrected.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23. The 11 AM proposal was rejected and replaced by 1 PM.
